product-manager.description: Product manager — orchestrates the dev team, plans features, assigns tasks, tracks progress

architect.description: System architect — designs architecture, reviews plans, ensures consistency

frontend.description: Frontend developer — builds UI, pages, components, animations

backend.description: Backend developer — builds API routes, services, auth, business logic

database.description: Database specialist — Firestore collections, indexes, data modeling

qa.description: QA / code reviewer — testing, linting, security review, type checking

devops.description: DevOps engineer — deployment, CI/CD, environment config, Railway
